info.title: NXpotify
info.author: etonedemid
info.description: Spotify Connect client for Nintendo Switch
info.details:
Stream music directly to your Switch via Spotify Connect. Appears as a Spotify device on your network -- just select it in the Spotify app and play.

Features
- Full Spotify Connect support (play, pause, skip, seek, shuffle, repeat)
- Album art with spectrum visualizer
- Layout presets and accent color theming (including auto-extract from album art)
- Touchscreen support (tap to play/pause, swipe to skip, tap progress bar to seek)
- Pro Controller, Joy-Con, and handheld mode support
- Device auth via QR code (one-time setup)

changelog:
v2.0.0.0
- Modernized Spotify Connect backend (Connect State API v1)
- Fixed track queue and playlist playback (clicking any track now plays the correct one)
- Fixed auto-advance to next track
- Layout presets (Classic, Big Art, Compact) and accent color theming
- Album art dominant color extraction for automatic accent
- Settings panel accessible from the waiting screen
- Settings persist across sessions
- Fixed gamepad inputs for handheld and Joy-Con modes
- Removed unused OLV/Miiverse code
